prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Bollywood movie is the highest-grossing Indian film of all time? Winner gives out 4 sips.
prompts.answer: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion (2017) or RRR (2022) depending on how you count

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What country produces the most films per year? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: India (Bollywood + regional industries) - over 1,500-2,000 films per year

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What Mexican director made The Shape of Water, Pan's Labyrinth, and Pacific Rim? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: Guillermo del Toro

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What French movie about a friendship between a rich quadriplegic and his caretaker was remade as The Upside? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: The Intouchables (2011)

Everyone must speak in a movie accent for {rule_turns} rounds. Normal voice = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Accents are done. Back to your regular voice.

prompts.text: No saying any movie titles for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up = 2 sips.
{player1} is the Director. Everyone must get their approval before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. No approval = extra sip.
Before drinking, you must quote a movie. Can't? Extra 2 sips. Lasts {rule_turns} rounds.
Everyone must end their sentences with a movie title for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = 2 sips.
No one can say the word 'movie' or 'film' for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up = 2 sips.
{player1} is the Critic. They rate every answer 1-10 for {rule_turns} rounds. Under 5 = take a sip.
Everyone must do a dramatic pause before answering for {rule_turns} rounds. No pause = 1 sip.
{player1} is Thumbmaster. When they put their thumb on the table, last to notice takes 2 sips. {rule_turns} rounds.
No pointing for {rule_turns} rounds. If you point, take 2 sips.
Everyone must whisper for {rule_turns} rounds. Full volume = 2 sips.
For {rule_turns} rounds, you must hold your drink with your pinky out. Drop the pinky = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Pinky out rule is done. Drink like a normal person.

prompts.text: {player1} picks a word. For {rule_turns} rounds, whoever says that word takes 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: {player1}'s banned word is no longer banned.

prompts.text: Every time you drink for the next {rule_turns} rounds, you must say 'And the Oscar goes to...' first.
prompts.rule_end_text: No more Oscar speeches before drinking.

prompts.text: For {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must do jazz hands after answering. No jazz hands = 1 sip.
No using anyone's real name for {rule_turns} rounds. Use movie character names instead. Slip up = 2 sips.
For {rule_turns} rounds, drink with your non-dominant hand. Wrong hand = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Drink with whatever hand you want.

prompts.text: {player1} is the Narrator. They narrate what everyone does for {rule_turns} rounds. If they stop narrating, they take 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: {player1} has stopped narrating. The story is over.

prompts.text: For {rule_turns} rounds, before every answer you must say 'In my professional opinion.' Skip it = 1 sip.
For {rule_turns} rounds, anyone who laughs takes 1 sip. Try to make people laugh.

{player1}, take 4 sips. The critics gave your night 1 star.

Floor is lava! Last person to point down drinks 3 sips.
{player1}, Would You Rather: only watch movies from before 2000 forever OR never rewatch a movie again? Group votes on your answer -- bad choice = 3 sips.

Movie quote battle! Go around quoting movies. First to repeat or fail takes 4 sips.
Everyone vote: best movie of all time. Anyone in the minority takes 2 sips.
{player1}, pick a genre. Everyone must name a movie from that genre in 5 seconds. Fail = 3 sips.
Freeze frame! Last person to freeze in place drinks 3 sips.
The group decides: {player1} must do their best movie impression or take 5 sips.
